minesweeper.label: Minesweeper
minesweeper.desc: Start a minefield wager — the 🔥 button cashes out
config.heading: 💣 Minesweeper — Settings
config.no_currency: No currency set up yet. First create a currency under Economy.
config.intro: 5x5 grid (Discord's maximum: 5 rows × 5 buttons). The user picks the number of mines (1-24) at the start — the fair multiplier automatically increases with more mines. The RTP below scales this fair value (= house edge), just like in the casino games. Unchanged = fair default value (97%).
